basic_process_work_item_state_to_do_doin: Basic-process work item state (To Do, Doing, Done)
basic_work_item_type_issue_task_epic: Basic work item type (Issue, Task, Epic)
compile_release_notes_from_the_work_item: Compile release notes from the work items completed between two Azure DevOps builds. Use at release time to summarize what shipped.
completed_work_hours_microsoft_vsts_sche: Completed work hours (Microsoft.VSTS.Scheduling.CompletedWork); Basic process: Task only
create_a_new_azure_devops_work_item_issu: Create a new Azure DevOps work item (Issue, Task, or Epic) with the right fields. Use to file bugs, tasks, or features from another system.
ending_build_id_for_work_item_range: Ending build ID for work item range
integrate_azure_devops_into_your_workflo: Integrate Azure DevOps into your workflow. List and inspect pipelines and builds, query and manage work items, and add or read comments.
interact_with_azure_devops_pipelines_bui: Interact with Azure DevOps pipelines, builds, and work items
investigate_a_failed_azure_devops_build_: Investigate a failed Azure DevOps build, pinpoint the failing stage, and summarize the root cause. Use when a pipeline run breaks.
remaining_work_hours_microsoft_vsts_sche: Remaining work hours (Microsoft.VSTS.Scheduling.RemainingWork); Basic process: Task only
requires_build_read_and_work_items_read_: Requires Build: Read and Work Items: Read & Write scopes
select_system_id_system_title_system_sta: SELECT [System.Id], [System.Title], [System.State] FROM workitems WHERE [System.TeamProject] = @project ORDER BY [System.CreatedDate] DESC
start_date_microsoft_vsts_scheduling_sta: Start date (Microsoft.VSTS.Scheduling.StartDate); Basic process: Epic only
starting_build_id_for_work_item_range: Starting build ID for work item range
summarize_recent_azure_devops_pipeline_r: Summarize recent Azure DevOps pipeline run results to surface pass rate and regressions. Use for daily or weekly engineering health reports.
target_date_microsoft_vsts_scheduling_ta: Target date (Microsoft.VSTS.Scheduling.TargetDate); Basic process: Epic only
title: Title
work_item_effort_microsoft_vsts_scheduli: Work item effort (Microsoft.VSTS.Scheduling.Effort); Basic process: Issue only
